title: Stripe Minted $3.2 Billion in Cash in 2025, Setting Up Acquisition Hunt
summary: The payment giant’s revenue jumped by a third to $6.8 billion last year, according to a person familiar with its financial figures, marking its fastest revenue growth since 2021.
